member.name: T:KafkaFlow.Acks
member.summary: Acknowledge type

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.Acks.Leader
member.summary: Only waits leader's acknowledge

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.Acks.All
member.summary: Waits acknowledge from all brokers

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.Acks.None
member.summary: Don't wait acknowledge

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.Authentication.IOAuthBearerAuthenticator
member.summary: Authentication handler for OAuth Bearer.

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Authentication.IOAuthBearerAuthenticator.SetToken(System.String,System.Int64,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Set SASL/OAUTHBEARER token and metadata. The SASL/OAUTHBEARER token refresh callback or event handler should invoke this method upon success. The extension keys must not include the reserved key "`auth`", and all extension keys and values must conform to the required format as per https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7628#section-3.1.
member.param: The mandatory token value to set, often (but not necessarily) a JWS compact serialization as per https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7515#section-3.1
When the token expires, in terms of the number of milliseconds since the epoch
The mandatory Kafka principal name associated with the token
Optional SASL extensions dictionary, to be communicated to the broker as additional key-value pairs during the initial client response as per https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7628#section-3.1

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Authentication.IOAuthBearerAuthenticator.SetTokenFailure(System.String)
member.summary: SASL/OAUTHBEARER token refresh failure indicator. The SASL/OAUTHBEARER token refresh callback or event handler should invoke this method upon failure.
member.param: Mandatory human readable error reason for failing to acquire a token

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.AutoOffsetReset
member.summary: AutoOffsetReset enum values

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.AutoOffsetReset.Latest
member.summary: Only reads new messages in the topic

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.AutoOffsetReset.Earliest
member.summary: Reads the topic from the beginning

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IClusterConfigurationBuilder
member.summary: A interface to build the cluster configuration

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IClusterConfigurationBuilder.DependencyConfigurator
member.summary: Gets the dependency injection configurator

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IClusterConfigurationBuilder.WithBrokers(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Set the Kafka Brokers to be used
member.param: The brokers address to be used

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IClusterConfigurationBuilder.WithName(System.String)
member.summary: Sets a unique name for the cluster

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IClusterConfigurationBuilder.WithSecurityInformation(System.Action{KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation})
member.summary: Configures cluster security
member.param: A handler to sets the values

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IClusterConfigurationBuilder.AddProducer``1(System.Action{KafkaFlow.Configuration.IProducerConfigurationBuilder})
member.summary: Adds a producer to the cluster
member.param: A handler to configure the producer
member.typeparam: A type used to get the internal producer instance

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IClusterConfigurationBuilder.AddProducer(System.String,System.Action{KafkaFlow.Configuration.IProducerConfigurationBuilder})
member.summary: Adds a producer to the cluster
member.param: The producer name used to get its instance
A handler to configure the producer

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IClusterConfigurationBuilder.AddConsumer(System.Action{KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder})
member.summary: Adds a consumer to the cluster
member.param: A handler to configure the consumer

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IClusterConfigurationBuilder.OnStopping(System.Action{KafkaFlow.IDependencyResolver})
member.summary: Adds a handler to be executed when KafkaFlow cluster is stopping
member.param: A handler to KafkaFlow cluster stopping event

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IClusterConfigurationBuilder.OnStarted(System.Action{KafkaFlow.IDependencyResolver})
member.summary: Adds a handler to be executed after KafkaFlow cluster started
member.param: A handler to KafkaFlow cluster started event

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IClusterConfigurationBuilder.CreateTopicIfNotExists(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int16,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Adds a Topic to the Cluster
member.param: The number of Topic partitions. Default is to use the cluster-defined partitions.
The Topic replication factor. Default is to use the cluster-defined replication factor.

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder
member.summary: Used to build the consumer configuration

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.DependencyConfigurator
member.summary: Gets the dependency injection configurator

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.Topic(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the topic that will be used to read the messages, the partitions will be automatically assigned. librdkafka patterns are accepted.

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.ManualAssignPartitions(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Explicitly defines the topic and partitions that will be used to read the messages

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.Topics(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Sets the topics that will be used to read the messages, the partitions will be automatically assigned

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.Topics(System.String[])
member.summary: Sets the topics that will be used to read the messages, the partitions will be automatically assigned

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.WithName(System.String)
member.summary: Sets a unique name for the consumer

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.DisableManagement
member.summary: Sets the consumer as readonly, that means this consumer can not be managed and it will not send telemetry data

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.WithGroupId(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the group id used by the consumer

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.WithAutoOffsetReset(KafkaFlow.AutoOffsetReset)
member.summary: Sets the initial offset strategy used by new consumer groups. If your consumer group (set by method ) has no offset stored in Kafka, this configuration will be used

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.WithAutoCommitIntervalMs(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the interval used by the framework to commit the stored offsets in Kafka

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.WithMaxPollIntervalMs(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the max interval between message consumption, if this time exceeds the consumer is considered failed and Kafka will revoke the assigned partitions

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.WithWorkersCount(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the number of threads that will be used to consume the messages

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.WithWorkersCount(System.Func{KafkaFlow.Configuration.WorkersCountContext,KafkaFlow.IDependencyResolver,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{System.Int32}},System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Configures a custom function to dynamically calculate the number of workers.
member.param: A function that takes a WorkersCountContext object and returns a Task yielding the new workers count
The interval that the calculator will be called
member.returns: The IConsumerConfigurationBuilder instance for method chaining

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.WithWorkersCount(System.Func{KafkaFlow.Configuration.WorkersCountContext,KafkaFlow.IDependencyResolver,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{System.Int32}})
member.summary: Configures a custom function to dynamically calculate the number of workers. By default, this function is called every 5 minutes.
member.param: A function that takes a WorkersCountContext object and returns a Task yielding the new workers count
member.returns: The IConsumerConfigurationBuilder instance for method chaining

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.WithBufferSize(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets how many messages will be buffered for each worker

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.WithWorkerStopTimeout(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the time that the worker will wait to process the buffered messages before canceling the

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.WithWorkerStopTimeout(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Sets the time that the worker will wait to process the buffered messages before canceling the

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.WithWorkerDistributionStrategy``1(KafkaFlow.Factory{``0})
member.summary: Sets the strategy to choose a worker when a message arrives
member.typeparam: A class that implements the interface
member.param: A factory to create the instance

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.WithWorkerDistributionStrategy``1
member.summary: Sets the strategy to choose a worker when a message arrives
member.typeparam: A class that implements the interface

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.WithManualMessageCompletion
member.summary: Configures the consumer for manual message completion. The client should call the to mark the message processing as finished

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.WithoutStoringOffsets
member.summary: No offsets will be stored on Kafka

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.WithInitialState(KafkaFlow.ConsumerInitialState)
member.summary: Configures the consumer initial state.The default is

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.AddMiddlewares(System.Action{KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerMiddlewareConfigurationBuilder})
member.summary: Adds middlewares to the consumer. The middlewares will be executed in the registration order

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.WithStatisticsHandler(System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Adds a handler for the Kafka consumer statistics

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IConsumerConfigurationBuilder.WithStatisticsIntervalMs(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the interval the statistics are emitted

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IGlobalEvents
member.summary: Provides access to events fired by the internals of the library

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IGlobalEvents.MessageConsumeCompleted
member.summary: Gets the message consume completed event

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IGlobalEvents.MessageConsumeError
member.summary: Gets the message consume error event

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IGlobalEvents.MessageConsumeStarted
member.summary: Gets the message consume started event

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IGlobalEvents.MessageProduceCompleted
member.summary: Gets the message produce completed event

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IGlobalEvents.MessageProduceError
member.summary: Gets the message produce error event

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IGlobalEvents.MessageProduceStarted
member.summary: Gets the message produce started event

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IKafkaConfigurationBuilder
member.summary: A builder to configure KafkaFlow

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IKafkaConfigurationBuilder.AddCluster(System.Action{KafkaFlow.Configuration.IClusterConfigurationBuilder})
member.summary: Adds a new Cluster
member.param: A handle to configure the cluster

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IKafkaConfigurationBuilder.UseLogHandler``1
member.summary: Set the log handler to be used by the Framework, if none is provided the will be used
member.typeparam: A class that implements the interface

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IKafkaConfigurationBuilder.SubscribeGlobalEvents(System.Action{KafkaFlow.Configuration.IGlobalEvents})
member.summary: Subscribe the global events defined in
member.param: A handle to subscribe the events

member.summary: Registers a middleware
member.param: A factory to create the instance

member.summary: Registers a middleware at the beginning of the middleware list The middleware will run before other middlewares that already have been registered
member.param: A factory to create the instance

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IMiddlewareConfigurationBuilder`1.Add``1(KafkaFlow.MiddlewareLifetime)
member.summary: Registers a middleware

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IMiddlewareConfigurationBuilder`1.AddAtBeginning``1(KafkaFlow.MiddlewareLifetime)
member.summary: Registers a middleware at the beginning of the middleware list The middleware will run before other middlewares that already have been registered

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IProducerConfigurationBuilder
member.summary: Used to build the producer configuration

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IProducerConfigurationBuilder.DependencyConfigurator
member.summary: Gets the dependency injection configurator

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IProducerConfigurationBuilder.AddMiddlewares(System.Action{KafkaFlow.Configuration.IProducerMiddlewareConfigurationBuilder})
member.summary: Adds middlewares to the producer. The middlewares will be executed in the registration order

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IProducerConfigurationBuilder.DefaultTopic(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the default topic to be used when producing messages

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IProducerConfigurationBuilder.WithAcks(KafkaFlow.Acks)
member.summary: Sets the to be used when producing messages

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IProducerConfigurationBuilder.WithLingerMs(System.Double)
member.summary: Delay in milliseconds to wait for messages in the producer queue to accumulate before constructing message batches to transmit to brokers. A higher value allows larger and more effective (less overhead, improved compression) batches of messages to accumulate at the expense of increased message delivery latency. default: 0.5 (500 microseconds) importance: high
member.param: The time in milliseconds to wait to build the message batch

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IProducerConfigurationBuilder.WithStatisticsHandler(System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Adds a handler for the Kafka producer statistics

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Configuration.IProducerConfigurationBuilder.WithStatisticsIntervalMs(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the interval the statistics are emitted

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SaslMechanism
member.summary: SaslMechanism enum values

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SaslMechanism.Gssapi
member.summary: GSSAPI

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SaslMechanism.Plain
member.summary: PLAIN

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SaslMechanism.ScramSha256
member.summary: SCRAM-SHA-256

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SaslMechanism.ScramSha512
member.summary: SCRAM-SHA-512

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SaslMechanism.OAuthBearer
member.summary: OAUTH-BEARER

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SaslOauthbearerMethod
member.summary: SaslOauthbearerMethod enum values

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SaslOauthbearerMethod.Default
member.summary: Default

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SaslOauthbearerMethod.Oidc
member.summary: Oidc

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation
member.summary: Represent the Kafka security information

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SecurityProtocol
member.summary:
Gets or sets the protocol used to communicate with brokers.
default: plaintext importance: high

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SaslMechanism
member.summary: Gets or sets the SASL mechanism to use for authentication. Supported: GSSAPI, PLAIN, SCRAM-SHA-256, SCRAM-SHA-512. **NOTE**: Despite the name, you may not configure more than one mechanism.

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SslCipherSuites
member.summary:
Gets or sets the cipher suites. A cipher suite is a named combination of authentication, encryption, MAC and key exchange algorithm used to negotiate the security settings for a network connection using TLS or SSL network protocol. See manual page for `ciphers(1)` and `SSL_CTX_set_cipher_list(3).
default: '' importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SslCurvesList
member.summary:
Gets or sets the supported-curves extension in the TLS ClientHello message specifies the curves (standard/named, or 'explicit' GF(2^k) or GF(p)) the client is willing to have the server use. See manual page for `SSL_CTX_set1_curves_list(3)`. OpenSSL >= 1.0.2 required.
default: '' importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SslSigalgsList
member.summary:
Gets or sets the sigalgs list. The client uses the TLS ClientHello signature_algorithms extension to indicate to the server which signature/hash algorithm pairs may be used in digital signatures. See manual page for `SSL_CTX_set1_sigalgs_list(3)`. OpenSSL >= 1.0.2 required.
default: '' importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SslKeyLocation
member.summary:
Gets or sets the path to client's private key (PEM) used for authentication.
default: '' importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SslKeyPassword
member.summary:
Gets or sets the private key passphrase (for use with `ssl.key.location` and `set_ssl_cert()`)
default: '' importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SslKeyPem
member.summary:
Gets or sets the client's private key string (PEM format) used for authentication.
default: '' importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SslCertificateLocation
member.summary:
Gets or sets the path to client's public key (PEM) used for authentication.
default: '' importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SslCertificatePem
member.summary:
Gets or sets client's public key string (PEM format) used for authentication.
default: '' importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SslCaLocation
member.summary:
Gets or sets file or directory path to CA certificate(s) for verifying the broker's key.
default: '' importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SslCaPem
member.summary:
Gets or sets the CA certificate(s) value for verifying the broker's key.
default: '' importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SslCrlLocation
member.summary:
Gets or sets the path to CRL for verifying broker's certificate validity.
default: '' importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SslKeystoreLocation
member.summary:
Gets or sets the path to client's keystore (PKCS#12) used for authentication.
default: '' importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SslKeystorePassword
member.summary:
Gets or sets the client's keystore (PKCS#12) password.
default: '' importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.EnableSslCertificateVerification
member.summary:
Gets or sets the Enable OpenSSL's builtin broker (server) certificate verification. This verification can be extended by the application by implementing a certificate_verify_cb.
default: true importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SslEndpointIdentificationAlgorithm
member.summary:
Gets or sets the endpoint identification algorithm to validate broker hostname using broker certificate. https - Server (broker) hostname verification as specified in RFC2818. none - No endpoint verification. OpenSSL >= 1.0.2 required.
default: none importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SaslKerberosServiceName
member.summary:
Gets or sets the Kerberos principal name that Kafka runs as, not including /hostname@REALM
default: kafka importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SaslKerberosPrincipal
member.summary:
Gets or sets the client's Kerberos principal name. (Not supported on Windows, will use the logon user's principal).
default: kafkaclient importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SaslKerberosKinitCmd
P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SaslKerberosKeytab
member.summary:
Gets or sets the path to Kerberos keytab file. This configuration property is only used as a variable in `sasl.kerberos.kinit.cmd` as ` ... -t "%{sasl.kerberos.keytab}"`.
default: '' importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SaslKerberosMinTimeBeforeRelogin
member.summary:
Gets or sets the minimum time in milliseconds between key refresh attempts. Disable automatic key refresh by setting this property to 0.
default: 60000 importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SaslUsername
member.summary:
Gets or sets the SASL username for use with the PLAIN and SASL-SCRAM-.. mechanisms
default: '' importance: high

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SaslPassword
member.summary:
Gets or sets the SASL password for use with the PLAIN and SASL-SCRAM-.. mechanism
default: '' importance: high

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SaslOauthbearerConfig
member.summary:
Gets or sets the SASL/OAUTHBEARER configuration. The format is implementation-dependent and must be parsed accordingly. The default unsecured token implementation (see https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7515#appendix-A.5) recognizes space-separated name=value pairs with valid names including principalClaimName, principal, scopeClaimName, scope, and lifeSeconds. The default value for principalClaimName is "sub", the default value for scopeClaimName is "scope", and the default value for lifeSeconds is 3600. The scope value is CSV format with the default value being no/empty scope. For example: `principalClaimName=azp principal=admin scopeClaimName=roles scope=role1,role2 lifeSeconds=600`. In addition, SASL extensions can be communicated to the broker via `extension_NAME=value`. For example: `principal=admin extension_traceId=123`
default: '' importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.EnableSaslOauthbearerUnsecureJwt
member.summary:
Gets or sets enable the builtin unsecure JWT OAUTHBEARER token handler if no oauthbearer_refresh_cb has been set. This builtin handler should only be used for development or testing, and not in production.
default: false importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SaslOauthbearerMethod
member.summary:
Gets or sets the SaslOauthbearerMethod
default: false importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SaslOauthbearerClientId
member.summary:
Gets or sets the SaslOauthbearerClientId
default: false importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SaslOauthbearerClientSecret
member.summary:
Gets or sets the SaslOauthbearerClientSecret
default: false importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SaslOauthbearerTokenEndpointUrl
member.summary:
Gets or sets the SaslOauthbearerTokenEndpointUrl
default: false importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.SaslOauthbearerScope
member.summary:
Gets or sets the SaslOauthbearerScope
default: false importance: low

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SecurityInformation.OAuthBearerTokenRefreshHandler
member.summary: Gets or sets the OAuthBearerTokenRefreshHandler for custom OAuth authentication.

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.Configuration.SslEndpointIdentificationAlgorithm.Https
member.summary: Https

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.Configuration.WorkersCountContext
member.summary: A metadata class with some context information help to calculate the number of workers

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.WorkersCountContext.ConsumerName
member.summary: Gets the consumer's name

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.WorkersCountContext.ConsumerGroupId
member.summary: Gets the consumer's group id

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Configuration.WorkersCountContext.AssignedTopicsPartitions
member.summary: Gets the assigned partitions to the consumer

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.ConsumerInitialState
member.summary: Consumer initial state options

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.ConsumerInitialState.Running
member.summary: Automatically start the consumer when the bus is started

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.ConsumerInitialState.Stopped
member.summary: Do not start the consumer when the bus is started

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.IWorker
member.summary: Represents the interface of a internal worker

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IWorker.Id
member.summary: Gets worker's id

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IWorker.WorkerStopping
member.summary: Gets the subject for worker stopping events where observers can subscribe to receive notifications.

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IWorker.WorkerStopped
member.summary: Gets the subject for worker stopped events where observers can subscribe to receive notifications.

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IWorker.WorkerProcessingEnded
member.summary: Gets the subject for worker consumption completed events where observers can subscribe to receive notifications.

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.MiddlewareDelegate
member.summary: The delegate used to call the next middleware
member.param: The message context to be passed to the next middleware

member.summary: Defines a factory to create an instance of type

member.summary: Provides extension methods over

member.summary: Registers a singleton type mapping

member.summary: Registers a singleton type mapping
member.param: The object that this method was called on

member.summary: Registers a singleton type mapping where the returned instance will be the given implementation
member.param: The object that this method was called on

member.summary: Registers a singleton type mapping where the returned instance will be given by the provided factory

A factory to create new instances of the service implementation

member.summary: Registers a scoped type mapping where the returned instance will be given by the provided factory
member.param: The object that this method was called on
A factory to create new instances of the service implementation

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.DependencyConfiguratorExtensions.AddTransient(KafkaFlow.IDependencyConfigurator,System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Registers a transient type mapping
member.param: The object that this method was called on

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.DependencyConfiguratorExtensions.AddTransient``1(KafkaFlow.IDependencyConfigurator)
member.summary: Registers a transient type mapping
member.param: The object that this method was called on

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.ICompressor
member.summary: Used to create a message compressor

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.ICompressor.Compress(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Compress the given message

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.IConsumerContext
member.summary: Represents the message consumer

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IConsumerContext.ConsumerName
member.summary: Gets the consumer unique name defined in configuration

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IConsumerContext.WorkerStopped
member.summary: Gets a CancellationToken that is cancelled when the worker is requested to stop

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IConsumerContext.WorkerId
member.summary: Gets the worker id that is processing the message

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IConsumerContext.Topic
member.summary: Gets the topic associated with the message

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IConsumerContext.Partition
member.summary: Gets the partition associated with the message

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IConsumerContext.Offset
member.summary: Gets the partition offset associated with the message

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IConsumerContext.TopicPartitionOffset
member.summary: Gets the object associated with the message

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IConsumerContext.GroupId
member.summary: Gets the consumer group id from kafka consumer that received the message

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IConsumerContext.MessageTimestamp
member.summary: Gets message timestamp. By default is the UTC timestamp when the message was produced

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IConsumerContext.AutoMessageCompletion
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether if the framework should invoke the method after the message has been processed

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IConsumerContext.ShouldStoreOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether if the message offset must be stored when the message is marked as completed

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IConsumerContext.ConsumerDependencyResolver
member.summary: Gets an instance of IDependencyResolver which provides methods to resolve dependencies. This instance is tied to the consumer scope, meaning it is capable of resolving dependencies that are scoped to the lifecycle of a single consumer.

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IConsumerContext.WorkerDependencyResolver
member.summary: Gets an instance of IDependencyResolver which provides methods to resolve dependencies. This instance is tied to the worker scope, meaning it is capable of resolving dependencies that are scoped to the lifecycle of a single worker.

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IConsumerContext.Completion
member.summary: Gets a Task that completes when the method is invoked, indicating the end of message processing. This allows async operations to wait for the message to be fully processed and its offset stored.

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.IConsumerContext.Complete
member.summary: Signals the completion of message processing and stores the message offset to eventually be committed. After this call, the framework marks the message processing as finished and releases resources associated with the message. By default, this method is automatically invoked when message processing concludes, unless the consumer is configured for manual message completion or the flag is set to false.

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.IConsumerContext.GetOffsetsWatermark
member.summary: Get offset watermark data

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.IConsumerContext.Pause
member.summary: Pause Kafka's message fetch, buffered messages will still be processed

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.IConsumerContext.Resume
member.summary: Resume Kafka's message fetch

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.IDateTimeProvider
member.summary: Provides access to DateTime static members

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.IDecompressor
member.summary: Used to create a message decompressor

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.IDecompressor.Decompress(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decompress the given message

member.param: The that controls the lifetime of the returned instance
member.returns: The object that this method was called on

member.summary: Registers a singleton type mapping where the returned instance will be the given implementation.
member.returns: The object that this method was called on

member.summary: Resolve an instance of the requested type

member.summary: Represents the interface of a dependency injection resolver scope

member.summary: Gets the dependency injection resolver

member.summary: Represents an Event to be subscribed.

member.param: The handler to be called when the event is fired.

member.summary: Represents an Event to be subscribed.
member.typeparam: The argument expected by the event.

member.summary: Represents an Event subscription.

member.summary: Cancels the subscription to the event.

member.summary: An interface used to create a log handler

member.summary: Writes a error log entry
member.param: Additional data related to the error log

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.ILogHandler.Warning(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Writes a warning log entry
member.param: Additional data related to the warning log

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.ILogHandler.Warning(System.String,System.Exception,System.Object)
member.summary: Writes a warning log entry
member.param: Additional data related to the warning log

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.ILogHandler.Info(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Writes a info log entry
member.param: Additional data related to the info log

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.ILogHandler.Verbose(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Writes a verbose log entry
member.param: Additional data related to the verbose log

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.IMessageContext
member.summary: A context that contains the message and metadata

member.summary: Gets the message

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IMessageContext.Headers
member.summary: Gets the message headers

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IMessageContext.ConsumerContext
member.summary: Gets the from the consumed message

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IMessageContext.ProducerContext
member.summary: Gets the from the produced message

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IMessageContext.Items
member.summary: Gets the items

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IMessageContext.DependencyResolver
member.summary: Gets an instance of IDependencyResolver which provides methods to resolve dependencies. This instance is tied to the message scope, meaning it is capable of resolving dependencies that are scoped to the lifecycle of a single processed message.

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IMessageContext.Brokers
member.summary: Gets the brokers associated with the message

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.IMessageContext.SetMessage(System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: Creates a new with the new message
member.returns: A new message context containing the new values

member.summary: Used to create a message handler

member.summary: the method that will be called when a arrives
member.param: The message type to be processed

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.IMessageHandler
member.summary: Used to create a message handler

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.IMessageHeaders
member.summary: Represents a collection of message headers

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IMessageHeaders.Item(System.String)
member.summary: Gets or sets the header with a specified key
member.param: The zero-based index of the element to get

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.IMessageHeaders.Add(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Adds a new header to the enumeration

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.IMessageMiddleware
member.summary: Used to create a message middleware

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.IMessageMiddleware.Invoke(KafkaFlow.IMessageContext,KafkaFlow.MiddlewareDelegate)
member.summary: The method that is called when the middleware is invoked
member.param: A delegate to the next middleware

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.InstanceLifetime
member.summary: Specifies the lifetime of a class

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.InstanceLifetime.Singleton
member.summary: Specifies that a single instance of the class will be created for the entire application

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.InstanceLifetime.Scoped
member.summary: Specifies that a new instance of the class will be created for each scope

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.InstanceLifetime.Transient
member.summary: Specifies that a new instance of the class will be created every time it is requested

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.IOffsetsWatermark
member.summary: Interface that represents the low and high watermark offsets of a topic/partition

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IOffsetsWatermark.High
member.summary: Gets the high watermark offset, which is the offset of the latest message in the topic/partition available for consumption + 1

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IOffsetsWatermark.Low
member.summary: Gets the offset of the earliest message in the topic/partition

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.IProducerContext
member.summary: Some producer metadata

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IProducerContext.Topic
member.summary: Gets the topic associated with the message

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IProducerContext.Partition
member.summary: Gets the partition associated with the message

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IProducerContext.Offset
member.summary: Gets the partition offset associated with the message

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.IProducerContext.DependencyResolver
member.summary: Gets an instance of IDependencyResolver which provides methods to resolve dependencies. This instance is tied to the producer scope, meaning it is capable of resolving dependencies that are scoped to the lifecycle of a single producer.

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.ISerializer
member.summary: Used to implement a message serializer

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.ISerializer.SerializeAsync(System.Object,System.IO.Stream,KafkaFlow.ISerializerContext)
member.summary: Serializes the given message
member.param: A stream to write the serialized data

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.ISerializerContext
member.summary: Context for serialization and deserialization operations.

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.ISerializerContext.Topic
member.summary: Gets the topic associated with the message

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.IWorkerDistributionStrategy
member.summary: An interface used to create a distribution strategy

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.IWorkerDistributionStrategy.Initialize(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{KafkaFlow.IWorker})
member.summary: Initializes the distribution strategy, this method is called when a consumer is started
member.param: List of workers to be initialized

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.IWorkerDistributionStrategy.GetWorkerAsync(KafkaFlow.WorkerDistributionContext)
member.summary: Retrieves an available worker based on the provided distribution strategy context.
member.param: The distribution strategy context containing message and consumer details.

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.Message
member.summary: Represents a Kafka message

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.Message.#ctor(System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Message.Key
member.summary: Gets the message key

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.Message.Value
member.summary: Gets the message value

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.MessageErrorEventContext
member.summary: Represents the errors in message context used in the events

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.MessageErrorEventContext.#ctor(KafkaFlow.IMessageContext,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.MessageErrorEventContext.Exception
member.summary: Gets the exception

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.MessageEventContext
member.summary: Represents a message context used in the events

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.MessageEventContext.#ctor(KafkaFlow.IMessageContext)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.MessageEventContext.MessageContext
member.summary: Gets the message context

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.MiddlewareLifetime
member.summary: Specifies the lifetime of a middleware

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.MiddlewareLifetime.Singleton
member.summary: Denotes a single instance of the middleware to be maintained throughout the application's lifecycle. This instance will not be disposed until the application is shut down.

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.MiddlewareLifetime.Message
member.summary: Indicates a new middleware instance is instantiated for each individual message scope, ensuring isolated processing. This instance will be disposed when the message scope ends.

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.MiddlewareLifetime.Transient
member.summary: Signifies a new middleware instance is created every time a request is made, providing the highest level of isolation. This instance will be disposed as soon as it goes out of scope.

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.MiddlewareLifetime.ConsumerOrProducer
member.summary: Specifies a separate middleware instance for each Consumer/Producer, useful for maintaining context within the Consumer/Producer scope. This instance will be disposed when the Consumer/Producer it belongs to is disposed.

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.MiddlewareLifetime.Worker
member.summary: Specifies a unique middleware instance for each Consumer Worker. For Producers, this behaves as ConsumerOrProducer. This allows context preservation at a worker level. This instance will be disposed when the Worker it belongs to is disposed.

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.NullLogHandler
member.summary: A log handler that does nothing

member.name: F:KafkaFlow.SerializerContext.Empty
member.summary: The static instance of the

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.SerializerContext.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.SerializerContext.Topic
member.summary: Gets the topic associated with the message

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.TopicPartitionOffset
member.summary: Represents a Kafka topic along with its partition and offset information.

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.TopicPartitionOffset.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct with the specified topic name, partition number, and offset value.

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.TopicPartitionOffset.Topic
member.summary: Gets the name of the topic.

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.TopicPartitionOffset.Partition
member.summary: Gets the id of the partition.

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.TopicPartitionOffset.Offset
member.summary: Gets the offset value.

member.name: T:KafkaFlow.WorkerDistributionContext
member.summary: Represents a strategy context for distributing workers based on specific message and consumer details.

member.name: M:KafkaFlow.WorkerDistributionContext.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: A cancellation token that is cancelled when the consumer has stopped

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.WorkerDistributionContext.ConsumerName
member.summary: Gets the name of the consumer.

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.WorkerDistributionContext.Topic
member.summary: Gets the topic associated with the message.

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.WorkerDistributionContext.Partition
member.summary: Gets the partition number of the topic.

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.WorkerDistributionContext.RawMessageKey
member.summary: Gets the raw key of the message.

member.name: P:KafkaFlow.WorkerDistributionContext.ConsumerStoppedCancellationToken
member.summary: Gets the cancellation token that is cancelled when the consumer has stopped
